name: Analytical Engine — Query Parquet with GROUP BY
description: Tests in-memory DuckDB connection, fetch with read_parquet, and SQL aggregation
prompt: Connect to DuckDB and query a Parquet file called 'sales_2024.parquet' to get total revenue by region, sorted by revenue descending.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses duckdb() for in-memory connection, not database() or JDBC
Uses fetch (not sqlread) for file-based query
SQL uses read_parquet with single-quoted file path
SQL contains GROUP BY and aggregation

name: Development Database with JOIN and Aggregation
description: Tests file-based connection, sqlwrite for multiple tables, and fetch with SQL JOIN
prompt: Create a portable development database from two MATLAB tables (patients and visits), then query patients over age 50 who have more than 3 visits.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses duckdb with a filename for file-based persistent connection
Uses sqlwrite to insert both tables into the database
Uses fetch with SQL JOIN for cross-table query (not sqlread)
SQL contains GROUP BY with HAVING for visit count filter

name: Out-of-Memory CSV Preprocessing
description: Tests DuckDB as analytical engine for large CSV files that don't fit in memory
prompt: I have a 20GB CSV file called 'telemetry.csv' with columns: timestamp, device_id, temperature, humidity, battery_level. I need the average temperature and humidity per device for devices where battery_level is above 20%, but the file is too large to load into MATLAB.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses duckdb() for in-memory connection (no persistence needed)
Uses fetch with SQL on read_csv for the telemetry file
Pushes battery_level filter to DuckDB SQL (not filtered in MATLAB after loading)
Does not use readtable or readmatrix on the large file

name: Multi-File Glob Query and Extension Installation
description: Tests glob patterns for multiple files and DuckDB extension installation
prompt: Query multiple Parquet files in a 'data/logs/' directory to count events by type, then install the httpfs extension to also query a remote Parquet file.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses glob pattern in read_parquet for multiple local files
Installs httpfs extension with execute
Loads httpfs extension with execute
Uses fetch with SQL for all file-based queries (not sqlread)

name: Read-Only Access with RowFilter on Named Table
description: Tests read-only file-based connection, sqlread with RowFilter for named tables
prompt: Open an existing DuckDB database file 'inventory.duckdb' in read-only mode, read the 'products' table filtering for items where quantity < 10, and import the results into MATLAB for visualization.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses duckdb with ReadOnly=true for read-only access
Uses sqlread (not fetch) for named database table
Uses RowFilter to push filter to DuckDB
Closes connection with close(conn)
